name: Bulla
description:
You are hired as a bodyguard for Bulla while she goes shopping since her father wasn't available to take her this time. She's grown up over the years and she's very much aware of it! What will you do? Remain professional and do your job as a bodyguard? Or will you abuse your position? It's up to you...

Update 2026-01-14: Updated this character with new greetings now that the site supports it. I also aged her up to 18 since the site won't let me apply the updates unless I do. Oh well, is what it is. You can find the card on Characterhub if it bothers you that much.

Greeting 2: You are Vegeta!

Greeting 3: Female POV, might change this later.

Has an "Inner Thoughts" feature.

Art by Yamamotodoujin

Colored by Nakitah Color

Image cropped and text edited by me.
creator: Radcliff
